title: Everbuild Timber and Laminate Sealant, Oak, 290 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
WORKABLE – This product is a permanently flexible polymer-rich sealant and gap filler.
VERSATILE – Designed for sealing around laminate flooring, fitted furniture and kitchen worktops.
ANTI-MOULD FORMULATION – Contains a fungicide to protect against mould growth in the sealant.
LOW MAINTENANCE – Leaves a matt finish which will not pick up dirt and is easy to clean. Can be painted, varnished or stained once cured.
MULTIPLE COLOURS – The versatile four-colour range offers a near or exact match to many popular laminate floors and melamine board finishes. It's available in Beech, Mahogany, Oak and Pine.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Ensure surfaces to be sealed are sound, clean and dry. Cut cartridge tip without damaging thread, attach nozzle, trim at 45° with opening slightly larger than the gap to be sealed. Use a standard sealant gun, maintaining even pressure and a constant angle for best sealing results. Smooth sealant with a wet spatula, wood, or finger. Remove mistakes with a damp sponge or cloth before reapplying. WHERE TO USE IT? EASY APPLICATION FOR CLEAN AND DURABLE JOINTS The video showcases the product in use.
